nasb.text: He *said to them, “Because of your hardness of heart Moses permitted you to divorce your wives; but from the beginning it has not been this way.

esv.text: He said to them, “Because of your hardness of heart Moses allowed you to divorce your wives, but from the beginning it was not so.

cnv.text: 他說：“摩西因為你們的心硬，才准許你們休妻，但起初並不是這樣。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“因为摩西知道你们铁石心肠，所以才准你们休妻。但起初并不是这样。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“摩西因着你们的心里刚硬，才准许你们休妻，但并不是从起初就这样的。
